command:
Create a high-quality editorial knowledge graphic for an X Article.
All on-canvas text must be in Simplified Chinese only, except unavoidable product or model names.
Do not use English headings, translated body text, UI labels, or bilingual duplication unless explicitly requested.
Role: cover.
Image grammar: hook_cover.
Purpose: Compress the article's main idea into one visual system that is understandable in one glance..
Diagram type: system_stack.
Concept summary: Claude-to-IM-Skills 插件更新后支持微信，扫码配置，远程团队协作的最后一个手动断点正在被堵上。.
Style direction: editorial knowledge graphic, warm light background, flat diagram-first composition, mobile legibility first; Editorial-infographic style with hand-drawn organic lines, warm palette, conceptual composition. Not a screenshot, not a diagram — an editorial visual..
Background: warm cream paper-like background.
Primary accents: warm orange, coral red, teal green.
Line work: soft dark gray line work.
Scene elements: one dominant visual idea, 2-4 large visual nodes max, clear title area, one obvious structure, one focal visual occupying roughly 60-70% area, icon-based metaphor instead of literal screenshots, clean title zone with breathing room.
Key relationships to visualize: present one question and one promise, make the article worth clicking in one glance, make the core judgment visible within one glance, show one tension and one payoff only.
Layout pattern: diagram_left_text_right.
Diagram focus: single central system diagram.
Text position: right.
Text budget: no more than 2 major text blocks on the image.
Headline budget: <= 16 Chinese characters.
Subheadline budget: <= 16 Chinese characters.
Label budget: <= 8 Chinese characters per label.
Label count budget: <= 4 labels.
On-canvas headline: "编码心流终于不用被切断".
On-canvas subheadline: "Claude-to-IM-S".
Grammar rules: This is a hook-first cover, not a summary board. Show one tension or one question and one payoff only. Use 2-4 large visual nodes max. Do not turn the article into a dense chart.
Must have: clear information hierarchy, diagram-first composition, short Chinese labels, editorial infographic feeling, high readability on mobile, ample whitespace and one dominant focal structure, flat color blocks with clear line hierarchy, layout-first visual storytelling instead of decorative art, section visuals must map to explicit layout grammar (hub-spoke / linear-progression / comparison-matrix / bento-grid), wide editorial banner, clean empty space, flat shapes with restrained accents, short labels only, Background: warm off-white (#faf8f5)., Primary accent: warm coral (#e8734a)., Secondary accent: teal (#4a9e8e)., Linework: charcoal (#3a3a3a)., prefer conceptual composition over decorative scene rendering, preserve warm off-white background and restrained accent colors.
Must avoid: generic AI wallpaper, cyberpunk neon, photorealistic people, blue digital rain, low-information decoration, busy ornamental textures that reduce readability, style drift between cover and inline images, paragraph-like dense text rendered inside image blocks, no photorealism, no dense paragraphs in image, no random sci-fi effects, do not mimic generic social banner aesthetics, avoid full-image text walls or dense annotation.
Additional direction: Make this a hook-first cover. One question or tension, one promise, not a dense summary. Style profile: baoyu-cover-image: editorial-infographic (conceptual + warm + hand-drawn). Cover should feel like an editorial infographic hero image with calm hand-drawn confidence. Editorial-infographic: cream base, coral accent, teal structure. Hand-drawn with controlled imperfection. Apply baoyu-cover-image preset editorial-infographic with conceptual composition. Apply hand-drawn organic line quality with controlled imperfection and clean hierarchy..
The result should look like a premium creator-made article infographic, not generic AI art.
Keep the composition clean, explanatory, and mobile-legible.
Do not simply render the article's paragraph text into the image.
